title: BackPack and Gems
description: This mod adds backpacks, jewelry, a sword and a pickaxe.
body:
This NeoForge mod (version 1.21) isn't just about carrying more items. It introduces a progression system with new materials, powerful elemental equipment, and unique combat mechanics focused on improving the player's inventory and arsenal.

Key Features:

Advanced Storage:

Backpacks: Craft the standard Backpack and upgrade it to the Reinforced Backpack to carry even more items on your adventures.

New Materials: Use Reinforced Leather to craft the reinforced backpack.

New Equipment and Tools:

Elemental Sword: A powerful new weapon for fighting enemies.

Gem Pickaxe: A specialized tool with increased durability, speed, and a 3x3 mining area.

Gems: Introduction of Empty Gems, which can serve as a base for assistance.

Machinery:

The Refuser: A new functional block (machine) that appears to allow the creation of gems and tools.

Exclusive Enchantments:

Lifesteal: Regain health by attacking your enemies.

Additional Content:

Music: A new Music Disc for the Jukebox.

Achievements: A progression system with various custom achievements to guide the player through the mod.

Technical Details:

Version: 1.0.0

Loader: NeoForge

Minecraft: 1.21.8
